message:
feat(supervision): add app-level supervisor detection (6l1.4)

Implements AppSupervisionAnalyzer for detecting processes managed by
application-level supervisors: pm2, supervisord, nodemon, and forever.

Key features:
- Detects supervision via environment variables (PM2_HOME, SUPERVISOR_*,
  FOREVER_ROOT, NODEMON_CONFIG)
- Falls back to ancestry-based detection via SignatureDatabase
- Generates actionable commands for each supervisor type:
  - pm2: pm2 stop/restart/delete/logs
  - supervisord: supervisorctl stop/restart/status/tail
  - nodemon: pgrep guidance (dev tool)
  - forever: forever stop/restart/list
- Includes respawn hints and warnings about auto-restart behavior
- Adds nodemon and forever signatures to SignatureDatabase
- 8 unit tests including no-mock tests

This helps pt identify processes that would respawn if killed directly,
guiding users to use supervisor-level commands instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -801,6 +801,29 @@ impl SignatureDatabase {
                 .as_builtin(),
         );
 
+        let _ = self.add(
+            SupervisorSignature::new("nodemon", SupervisorCategory::Orchestrator)
+                .with_confidence(0.85)
+                .with_notes("nodemon - Node.js file watcher and auto-restarter")
+                .with_process_patterns(vec![r"^nodemon$", r"^node.*nodemon"])
+                .with_env_patterns(HashMap::from([
+                    ("NODEMON_CONFIG".into(), ".*".into()),
+                ]))
+                .as_builtin(),
+        );
+
+        let _ = self.add(
+            SupervisorSignature::new("forever", SupervisorCategory::Orchestrator)
+                .with_confidence(0.85)
+                .with_notes("forever - Node.js process manager")
+                .with_process_patterns(vec![r"^forever$", r"^node.*forever"])
+                .with_env_patterns(HashMap::from([
+                    ("FOREVER_ROOT".into(), ".*".into()),
+                ]))
+                .with_pid_files(vec!["~/.forever/pids/", "/var/run/forever/"])
+                .as_builtin(),
+        );
+
         let _ = self.add(
             SupervisorSignature::new("docker", SupervisorCategory::Orchestrator)
                 .with_confidence(0.85)
